allow: Bash(echo "started pid $!" sleep 8 curl -s -o /dev/null -w "Index: %{http_code}\\n" http://localhost:5099/ curl -s -o /dev/null -w "Pracownicy: %{http_code}\\n" http://localhost:5099/Home/Pracownicy curl -s -o /dev/null -w "Raporty: %{http_code}\\n" http://localhost:5099/Home/Raporty curl -s -o /dev/null -w "Ustawienia: %{http_code}\\n" http://localhost:5099/Home/Ustawienia curl -s http://localhost:5099/)

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process Firma.Intranet -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Get-Process Firma.PortalWWW -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep 2; 'killed'")

Bash(echo "started pid $!" sleep 12 echo "---codes---" curl -s -o /dev/null -w "Index: %{http_code}\\n" http://localhost:5099/ curl -s -o /dev/null -w "Pracownicy: %{http_code}\\n" http://localhost:5099/Home/Pracownicy curl -s -o /dev/null -w "Raporty: %{http_code}\\n" http://localhost:5099/Home/Raporty curl -s -o /dev/null -w "Ustawienia: %{http_code}\\n" http://localhost:5099/Home/Ustawienia echo "---sidebar links---" curl -s http://localhost:5099/)
